headline.text: L3 ML1 tempering unit *down 4+ hours* — still offline at window close, Robert and Chris called in early to assist.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 ran caramel cluster and jars with no major breaks. Sollich 2 buffer overfilled with dark chocolate at 22:19 but was cleaned. Sollich 3 ran out of caramel at 06:23, pausing depositing. Level 2 cleaning on Sollich 2 Cavanna 4 still incomplete at shift end — chicanes and conveyors need finishing.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ML3 and ML2 had brief line stops for sensor adjustments and missing print on boxes, both cleared inside 30 minutes. FFS line cycled through film tracking and Z-conveyor sensor faults, all resolved same-shift. Panning conveyor motor housing broke at 20:28 but was rewired and running by 23:34.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 ran a 12g startup that turned into a multi-hour fight. Metal detector belt tracking failed at 21:33, then tempering unit faulted at 02:59 and stayed down through window close despite Preston E and early callouts for Robert and Chris. ML4 had a chiller fault at 06:52 with 100 molds paused in cooler. Truffle Line guillotine seized at 03:22 and remained down at 07:15, preventing temper recovery.

resolved.title: Sollich 2 Cavanna 4 cleaning incomplete from prior shift
resolved.summary: Cavanna 4 appeared uncleaned; 2nd shift re-cleaned and passed ATP, though chicanes and aligner belt still need work for Level 2 sign-off.
resolved.resolution: Re-cleaned and passed ATP at 22:44 — "Cavanna 4 is clean and passed the ATP test" (Elizabeth Hernandez). Chicanes and cross conveyors flagged for completion.

resolved.title: Sollich 3 caramel supply ran out mid-shift
resolved.summary: Depositor ran out of caramel at 22:37; crew prepared for caustic clean but was redirected to continue cooking instead.
resolved.resolution: Crew redirected to continue cooking at 22:44 — "spoke with Dakota Adair, and we will continue cooking" (William Beattie).

resolved.title: Sollich 2 checkweigher tare misconfigured
resolved.summary: Checkweigher was set to 68 grams instead of the correct 69 grams for jar product.
resolved.resolution: Troy adjusted the tare setting to 69 grams at 08:32 — "adjusted the tare setting" (Ingrid Moreno Angarita).

resolved.title: FFS machine not dispensing product
resolved.summary: VFFS stopped dispensing at 21:11; maintenance worked on funnel setup.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 21:28 — "The machine is working!" (VFFS).

resolved.title: ML3 laser not printing lot number on wrappers
resolved.summary: Laser failed, producing wrappers without lot numbers; one box affected and being inspected to remove bad wrappers.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 14:50 — "Problem resolved, the movie comes with its batch" (Marlenis Fernandez). Affected box isolated and inspected.

resolved.title: Panning conveyor belt bracket and motor housing damage
resolved.summary: Belt assembly bracket broke, screws fell; when moving panner it hit conveyor motor and broke housing.
resolved.resolution: Power cord rewired and conveyor working at 23:34 — "Conveyor is working" (Fernando Flores).

resolved.title: ML2 missing 'BEST IF' text on box laser print
resolved.summary: Video jet missing letters on cases; line stopped at 20:59 to add the required print.
resolved.resolution: Text added and line restarted at 21:08 — "problem resolved, words added" (Victor Leandro).

resolved.title: FFS Z-conveyor A shutting off intermittently
resolved.summary: Z-conveyor A kept tripping off; maintenance adjusted the top sensor.
resolved.resolution: Sensor adjusted at 23:36 — "adjusted the sensor on top, seems to be working well" (Gustavo Rodas).

resolved.title: FFS film tracking fault
resolved.summary: Line stopped at 03:49 for film tracking issues.
resolved.resolution: Film tracked and line running at 03:59 — "Line is running" (VFFS).

resolved.title: ML1 metal detector belt tracking off (first occurrence)
resolved.summary: Metal detector belt drifted and was down from 21:33 through multiple rounds of maintenance work.
resolved.resolution: Belt fixed at 02:37 — "Metal detector good" (Imperial).

resolved.title: ML1 metal detector belt tracking off (second occurrence)
resolved.summary: Metal detector belt failed again at 03:13 after earlier repair.
resolved.resolution: Belts fixed at 03:59 — "Belts fixed" (Imperial).

resolved.title: Truffle Line double pieces and poor appearance
resolved.summary: Center of line producing double pieces and poor chocolate coating at 07:58.
resolved.resolution: Appearance, double-feeding, and weight improved exponentially by 08:48 — "issues improved exponentially" (David Zuniaga).

resolved.title: Truffle Line M6 belt tracking issues
resolved.summary: M6 belt continuously moving/tracking incorrectly during startup at 09:15.
resolved.resolution: M6 belt running correctly at 16:24 — "M6 belt running correctly" (TruffleLine FW).

resolved.title: MF Matrix suction cups not detecting bag opening
resolved.summary: Machine failed to detect when bags opened, so funnel would not dispense product; suction cups misaligned.
resolved.resolution: Suction cups aligned and running good at 12:37 — "adjusted the top suction cups and it is running good now" (Ray Garcia).

resolved.title: Truffle Line flow wrapper issues
resolved.summary: Flow wrapper having unspecified issues at 14:56, maintenance working.
resolved.resolution: Problem solved at 15:18 — "Problem solved; the line is running fine" (TruffleLine FW).

resolved.title: ML1 C6 belt tracking north continuously
resolved.summary: C6 belt prior to Cavanna drifted north and would not track correctly, delaying first deposit.
resolved.resolution: Tracking corrected and depositing started at 19:04 — "They got it now and we started depositing" (Nathan Gevenois).

resolved.title: ML1 Cavanna open packages and doubles
resolved.summary: Cavanna flow wrapper producing open seals and double-feeding at 22:12.
resolved.resolution: Not explicitly stated as resolved, but line continued running and no further mentions after early shift updates.

resolved.title: ML4 TG4 belt broke
resolved.summary: TG4 conveyor belt broke at 23:37 and needed replacement.
resolved.resolution: Belt replaced by 04:02 — "This one was the solution of the belt broke" (ML4 TG).

resolved.title: Truffle Line Cavanna chain broke
resolved.summary: Cavanna chain broke during test run at 02:34.
resolved.resolution: Chain fixed at 04:56 — "Cavanna chain is fixed" (TruffleLine Enrober).

resolved.title: ML1 depositor pucks missing
resolved.summary: Crew could not locate the pucks needed for depositor setup.
resolved.resolution: Pucks located at 15:14 — "The pucks have been located" (Nathan Gevenois).

needs_attention.title: Sollich 2 return valve leaking dark chocolate into milk buffer
needs_attention.summary: Return pipe valve leaking, causing dark chocolate to contaminate milk buffer tank; needs 1 hour downtime to replace valve.
needs_attention.status: Valve identified as bad at 00:06, crew plans to go down 1 hour early before scheduled reheat to replace.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 3 depositor ran out of caramel
needs_attention.summary: Caramel depositor ran dry at 06:23, pausing production at window close.
needs_attention.status: Depositor out of caramel as of 06:23, no further updates before window close.

needs_attention.title: Tunnel 1 belt has bugs
needs_attention.summary: Bugs found on Sollich 4 tunnel 1 belt at 07:15; QA notified and operators will clean.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 07:15, QA notified, operators assigned to clean.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 2 Level 2 cleaning incomplete
needs_attention.summary: Cavanna 4 re-cleaned and passed ATP, but chicanes, aligner belt, and cross conveyors still need cleaning before Level 2 sign-off.
needs_attention.status: Cavanna 4 passed re-clean at 23:28, remaining areas flagged for completion.

needs_attention.title: ML1 tempering unit down
needs_attention.summary: Tempering unit faulted at 02:59 and remained offline through multiple attempts; Preston E unable to restart, Robert Villarreal and Chris Givens called in early.
needs_attention.status: Down since 02:59, Preston E unable to recover by 05:25, Robert and Chris called in at 05:26 — still down at window close 07:15.

needs_attention.title: Truffle Line guillotine seized
needs_attention.summary: Guillotine stopped working at 03:22 and remained down through window close; troubleshooting keeps resetting temper process, preventing temper recovery.
needs_attention.status: Down since 03:22, still offline at 05:47. Temper at 76.4°F at 05:47 and dropping. Preston E assigned one tech, Jakob reaching out to Vallarie for remote support.

needs_attention.title: ML4 chiller faulted out during first 100 molds
needs_attention.summary: Chiller faulted at 06:52 while first 100 molds were in cooler #1; molds paused, waiting on Alex to arrive.
needs_attention.status: Chiller down at 06:52, Nelson on-site, 100 molds paused in cooler waiting on Alex as of 06:59.

needs_attention.title: Truffle Line M6 belt damaged
needs_attention.summary: Damaged M6 belt discovered at 06:56; maintenance called to address.
needs_attention.status: Damaged belt found at 06:56, maintenance called, no resolution posted before window close.

needs_attention.title: ML1 Bosch Donner belt 2 misaligned and tore
needs_attention.summary: Belt 2 became misaligned and tore at 07:00; maintenance on line working to replace.
needs_attention.status: Belt torn at 07:00, maintenance working on replacement as of 07:01.
